positive: Stylized minimal aesthetic illustration of a whimsical forest creature portrait, featuring glowing bioluminescent fungi and oversized iridescent mushrooms, surrounded by delicate fern fronds and geometric crystal shards. The creature has an elegant, flowing silhouette, rendered in deep jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasted with glowing neon teal and gold highlights. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, suitable for a single-color or limited-color print repeat. Clean lines, sharp edges, graphic style, high contrast, vector art quality, flat design influences, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, photorealistic, ugly, abstract
